title: The Briefing
tagline: AI intelligence for Gauntlet AI — April 1, 2026

items.headline: GPT-5 arrives with 1M-token context and dramatic price cuts
items.summary: OpenAI's GPT-5 ships today with a million-token context window and 80% cost reduction versus GPT-4o. Early benchmarks show near-human performance on bar and medical exams. The model is available immediately via API and ChatGPT Plus.

items.headline: Anthropic releases Claude 4 Opus with extended thinking mode
items.summary: Claude 4 Opus introduces a new 'extended thinking' mode that allocates additional compute tokens for complex reasoning tasks. Anthropic claims 40% improvement on multi-step coding benchmarks.

items.headline: Devin 2.0 ships with persistent memory and multi-repo context
items.summary: Cognition's Devin 2.0 update adds cross-session memory, letting the agent remember architectural decisions and team conventions across projects. Also ships: parallel sub-agent spawning for large refactors.

items.headline: OpenAI's Operator expands to 40 new countries
items.summary: The web-browsing agent Operator is now available across Europe and Asia-Pacific, with new integrations for airline booking, government portals, and e-commerce checkouts.

items.headline: Suno v4 generates full 5-minute tracks with consistent structure
items.summary: Suno's latest model produces coherent verses, choruses, and bridges across full-length tracks — a long-standing weakness of previous versions. Voice cloning for custom vocal styles is now in beta.

items.headline: Udio partners with major labels for AI-assisted songwriter tools
items.summary: Three of the four major labels have signed licensing deals with Udio to co-develop AI-assisted songwriting and production tools for signed artists. A departure from their previous litigation posture.

items.headline: AI engineering salaries hit $280k median at top-20 tech firms
items.summary: Wellfound's Q1 2026 salary report shows AI-first engineers commanding a $280k median total comp at FAANG+, up 35% YoY. Demand outpaces supply by 4:1 for engineers who can build production agentic systems.

items.headline: Google I/O 2026 confirmed for May 14 — Gemini Ultra 2 expected
items.summary: Google confirmed the I/O date with a teaser site hinting at Gemini Ultra 2, Android AI integration, and new Workspace AI features. Analysts expect a direct GPT-5 response announcement.

items.headline: EU AI Act enforcement begins April 15 — high-risk system deadline
items.summary: The first enforcement deadline under the EU AI Act hits April 15, requiring high-risk AI system operators to complete conformity assessments. Legal teams across the industry scrambling.
